next_steps: Place a direct archive at knowledge/retrieval/FATHIYA_RETRIEVAL_INDEXES_v0.zip and rerun `python3 knowledge/retrieval/fathiya_retrieval.py import`.
Or place manifest.json plus chunk_*.b64 files under knowledge/retrieval/artifacts/FATHIYA_RETRIEVAL_INDEXES_v0/ and rerun `python3 knowledge/retrieval/fathiya_retrieval.py import --source chunks`.
